name: US500_M5_ATRBreakoutNYOpen_v1
hypothesis: On US500 M5, ATR-band breakouts triggered within the first 90 minutes of the NY cash session (13:30-15:00 UTC), filtered by ADX trend strength, capture opening-drive momentum with PF >= 2.0 over 200+ trades.

signals.entry_long: close > ema(20) + 1.5*ATR(14) AND close > highest(close, 12) AND session in [13:30,15:00] UTC
signals.entry_short: close < ema(20) - 1.5*ATR(14) AND close < lowest(close, 12) AND session in [13:30,15:00] UTC

rules: max 1 entry per session per direction

exits.time_stop: close at 16:00 UTC or after 18 M5 bars, whichever first
exits.trailing: move to breakeven at +1.0*ATR; trail by 1.0*ATR thereafter
